title: ctenitis strigilosa
intro: Ctenitis strigilosa, also known as the strigose ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis strigilosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Ctenitis strigilosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine in certain parts of the world.
